name: OpenCV Circle-Captcha Solver
description: Computer vision solver for Filecrypt Circle-Captcha. Uses Canny edge detection at multiple thresholds (30/100, 50/150), histogram equalization, HoughCircles detection, gap analysis to find incomplete circle. Returns (x,y) click coordinates. Falls back to random guess on failure.

name: Alpine OpenCV Docker Fix
description: Use Alpine py3-opencv package instead of pip opencv-python to avoid 10+ minute source compilation timeouts on arm64. Key: install py3-opencv, py3-numpy via apk, use --system-site-packages venv, install wheel with --no-deps
